title: Coca-Cola TOTEM
description: The change from Totem to Coca-Cola was
body:
# *Resource pack
Imagine you're in a terrible state of shock and need a rescue, and suddenly **Coca-Cola** comes to your rescue. What would you think of that?


<details>
<summary>*</summary>

*This is just a resource pack and does not affect the totem's properties.

</details>
